title: Colliers India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Colliers India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Colliers India in Mysuru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Colliers India:
Colliers India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Colliers India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
